objective: Add aria-live announcements to the Gillette website EstimatePage projected total and summary updates so recalculated pricing is announced accessibly.

functional: Projected pricing updates are exposed through an aria-live region on the estimate page.
Summary updates that change with user selections are announced accessibly.
The estimate UI keeps its current visual behavior while adding the accessibility hooks.
ui_checks: The estimate page still renders and responds to selections at /estimate.
No console errors appear while exercising the estimate form.
